creator: pneumann@gmail.com
text:
Hello Stacy.

        This probably means the system has too many open semaphores around.

        Try to remove the used ones, or grow your semaphores limit and try
        again.

        Take look at /usr/ports/lang/mono/pkg-message for details.

        thanks!

-- 


__________________
Phillip Neumann
pneumann@gmail.com
